TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_lalangaw, title = lalangaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/lalangaw} }

S.FORM: lalangaw u kamu nu Hulam:蒼蠅 u kamu nu Amilika: muscidae
S.PHON: r~ɾar~ɾaŋaw u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:** u kamu nu amir~ɾika: musʦidaə
